specifications.engine_details: 457 cc, Liquid-Cooled, 2 Parallel Twin cylinders (4 valves per cylinder)
features: Engine Maps (AEM) & Dual-Channel ABS with Anti-Roll-Over System
specifications.description: The Aprilia RS 457 is a sport-bike powered by a 457 cc liquid-cooled parallel-twin engine delivering 48 PS and 44 Nm of torque, mated to a 6-speed gearbox. It features a host of electronics – dual-channel ABS (switchable), traction control, multiple riding maps, built-in navigation and a 5-inch TFT instrument panel with digital speedometer/odometer, call-SMS alerts, service-due and distance-to-empty indicators. Metal-braided brake hoses, backlit handlebar controls and a split seat add to its premium feel. Overall mileage is quoted at 30 kmpl and the bike weighs about 175 kg kerb.

specifications.engine_details: 160.03 cc displacement, Air-cooled, Single cylinder (1 cylinder), 4-stroke, SOHC 3-valve
specifications.description: The Aprilia SR 160 is a performance-oriented 160 cc scooter featuring an air-cooled single-cylinder engine that produces 13.44 Nm of torque. It offers a sporty, aggressive design with LED lighting, a fully digital LCD console, and a suite of convenience and safety features including single-channel ABS, USB charging, under-seat storage, and various indicator lights. Fuel-injected and CVT-driven, the scooter claims an overall mileage of 35 kmpl and carries a kerb weight of 118 kg.

features: Disc front brake, drum rear brake
specifications.description: The Aprilia SR 125 is a performance-oriented 125 cc scooter featuring an air-cooled single-cylinder engine that delivers 10.11 PS and 10.33 Nm torque, paired with a CVT automatic transmission. It sports a sharp, aggressive design with LED headlamp, 14-inch wheels, disc front brake with ABS, and a fully digital instrument cluster offering speed, fuel level, mileage, trip and tachometer readouts. Additional conveniences include a USB charging port, under-seat storage, boot light, and service-due indicator. The scooter carries a 6-litre fuel tank and offers an official mileage of 40 kmpl.

specifications.engine_details: 457 cc displacement, liquid-cooled, parallel-twin (2 cylinders) with 4 valves per cylinder
specifications.description: The Aprilia Tuono 457 is a naked-streetfighter positioned as a powerful middle-weight bike for Indian riders. It houses a 457 cc liquid-cooled parallel-twin that delivers 47.6 PS and 43.5 Nm of torque, paired with a six-speed gearbox and slipper clutch. The bike is feature-rich, offering a 5-inch TFT display with navigation, Bluetooth connectivity, three ride-mode settings, dual-channel ABS, traction control, and a host of comfort and safety aids. Its aggressive styling, lightweight chassis (175 kg) and balanced dynamics make it suitable for both city commuting and spirited weekend rides.

features: Wheelie Control, Ride Control, Engine Brake Control, Speed Limiter
specifications.description: The Aprilia RSV4 is Aprilia’s flagship liter-class superbike, powered by a 1099 cc liquid-cooled V4 engine delivering 220 PS at 13 000 rpm and 127 Nm of torque. It features a six-speed gearbox with slipper clutch and a bidirectional quick-shifter. The bike is equipped with fully-adjustable, electronically-controlled Öhlins front fork and rear monoshock, wing-let aerodynamics, and twin-spar aluminium frame. Electronics include a 5-inch TFT console, 3-level cornering ABS, traction-control, wheelie & stoppie control, launch control, cruise control, navigation, Bluetooth connectivity, and a suite of rider-aid modes. Overall weight is 204 kg and fuel capacity is 18 L, giving an ARAI mileage of 15.4 kmpl.

specifications.engine_details: 125 cc displacement, Air-cooled, Single cylinder (1 cylinder)
features: LED headlight, LED taillight, LED turn-signal lamps
specifications.description: The Aprilia SXR 125 is a maxi-style scooter built on the same chassis as the SXR 160, featuring a 124.4 cc air-cooled, single-cylinder, 4-stroke engine that produces 9.61 PS at 7500 rpm and 10.19 Nm torque. It offers a fully digital instrument cluster, USB charging, full LED lighting, and a combi-brake system. With a 7-litre fuel tank and claimed mileage of 40 kmpl, it targets riders seeking sporty styling, comfortable seating, and adequate city-commuting performance.

specifications.engine_details: 659 cc, liquid-cooled, 2-cylinder parallel-twin, 4 valve per cylinder, semi-dry sump
specifications.description: Aprilia Tuareg 660 is an off-road adventure tourer priced from ₹18.85 Lakh (ex-showroom) in India. It is powered by a BS6-2.0 659 cc liquid-cooled parallel-twin engine delivering 80.21 PS and 70 Nm of torque. The bike features a 5-inch full-colour TFT console, Aprilia Performance Ride Control electronics (throttle-by-wire, four ride modes, traction control, cruise control, engine-brake control, rear-wheel lift-off control, switchable ABS), Bluetooth-enabled smartphone connectivity, navigation, quick-shifter, and dual-channel ABS. It weighs 204 kg, has an 18 L fuel tank, and offers an ARAI-claimed mileage of 20 kmpl.

specifications.engine_details: 124.45 cc, Air Cooled, Single cylinder (1 cylinder)
features: Combi Brake System (disc front, drum rear)
LED headlight & LED tail light with DRLs
Engine kill switch, pass switch, saree guard, hazard warning indicator, high-beam indicator, engine temperature indicator, malfunction indicator
specifications.description: The Aprilia SR 125 hp.e is a sporty 125 cc scooter that carries the same sleek design as the SR 125 but adds premium features such as a 5.5-inch coloured TFT display, Bluetooth navigation, a combi-brake system, and extensive digital instrumentation. It is positioned as one of the most powerful 125 cc scooters in India with a claimed 40 kmpl mileage and a top speed of 90 km/h.

The Aprilia SR 175 hp.e is a performance-oriented scooter that steps up from the SR 160 with a larger 174.7 cc air-cooled single-cylinder engine delivering 13.26 PS at 7200 rpm and 14.14 Nm of torque. It sports a sporty design, 5.5-inch coloured TFT display, Bluetooth connectivity, navigation, call/SMS alerts, and a suite of safety aids such as single-channel ABS and a combi-brake system. While its fuel economy is modest (≈47 kmpl), the scooter focuses on sharp acceleration, a top speed near 95 kmph, and a premium look with LED lighting and alloy wheels.

specifications.engine_details: 659 cc, liquid-cooled, parallel-twin (2 forward-facing cylinders), 4 valves per cylinder, Ride-By-Wire, 6-speed manual gearbox
features: Wheelie control, Engine braking, Engine maps
Pass Switch, Clock, Hazard Warning Lights, Shift Light, Engine Kill Switch
Low Battery Alert, Low Fuel Indicator
specifications.description: The Aprilia RS 660 is an Italian middleweight supersport bike built on the 660 platform. It is powered by a 659 cc liquid-cooled parallel-twin engine delivering 100 PS and 67 Nm of torque, coupled to a 6-speed slipper-clutch gearbox. The bike packs advanced electronics including cornering ABS, traction control, multiple riding modes, launch control, cruise control, a bidirectional quick-shifter and a 4.3-inch TFT display with Bluetooth and navigation. Its lightweight aluminium twin-spar frame, premium design cues from the RSV4, and premium components (Brembo brakes, Kayaba suspension) position it as a premium supersport offering in the Indian market.

specifications.engine_details: 160.03 cc displacement, Air-Cooled, Single cylinder (1 cylinder)
features: Combi Brake System (disc front, drum rear)
LED Headlight, LED DRLs, LED Taillight, LED Turn Signals
Carry hook, Passenger backrest, Passenger footrest
Low Battery Indicator, Low Fuel Indicator, Distance-to-Empty Indicator, Real-time mileage indicator
Adjustable front telescopic fork, rear hydraulic shock absorber
specifications.description: The Aprilia SXR 160 is Aprilia’s flagship 160 cc maxi-style scooter for the Indian market. It is powered by a BS6-compliant, air-cooled, single-cylinder 160 cc engine delivering 11.09 PS at 7200 rpm and 12.13 Nm of torque. The scooter features a fully digital LCD console with Bluetooth-enabled readouts, LED headlamp with DRLs, and a single-channel ABS. It offers a blend of sporty design—split LED lights, Y-shaped alloy wheels—and practical storage (under-seat, front apron, USB port). With a claimed fuel efficiency of 35 kmpl and a 7 L fuel tank, the SXR 160 aims to combine premium styling with decent performance for city and highway riding.

specifications.engine_details: 659 cc, liquid-cooled, 2 parallel-twin cylinders (4 valves per cylinder)
features: Wheelie Control, Engine Braking, Engine Maps
Hazard Warning Lights, Shift Light, Engine Kill Switch
specifications.description: The Aprilia Tuono 660 is a sports-bike with a semi-fairing, powered by a 659 cc BS6-2.0 liquid-cooled parallel-twin engine delivering 95.17 PS and 67 Nm of torque. It features a 6-speed slipper clutch, bidirectional quick-shifter, multiple riding modes, traction & wheelie control, cruise control, cornering ABS, a 4.3-inch TFT display with Bluetooth-enabled navigation, and LED lighting. The bike weighs 183 kg (kerb), has a 15 L fuel tank, and offers an ARAI-claimed mileage of 20.4 kmpl.

features: LED headlamp, LED taillight & LED turn-signal lamps
Analogue speedometer (with digital trip-meter, odometer & fuel gauge)
Disc front brake, drum rear brake
specifications.description: The Aprilia SR Storm 125 is Aprilia’s entry-level, budget-friendly scooter for the Indian market. Powered by a 124.49 cc air-cooled, 3-valve single-cylinder engine delivering 9.92 PS and 9.7 Nm of torque, it uses a CVT for smooth automatic shifting. The scooter combines sporty styling—block-pattern tyres, bold graphics, and an LED headlamp—with practical features such as a semi-digital console, USB charging, under-seat storage and a combined braking system. While it lacks advanced connectivity options like Bluetooth or smartphone navigation, it offers solid ride comfort, a claimed 38.5 kmpl fuel economy, and a kerb weight of 118 kg.

The Aprilia SR GT 400 is an upcoming model with launch date not yet confirmed. It is expected to be equipped with fuel injection and meet BS6-2.0 emission standards. Pricing, engine specifications, torque, mileage and detailed features are currently unavailable.
Upcoming adventure-type motorcycle expected to launch by mid-2026 with an expected ex-showroom price of Rs 4.5 – 5.0 lakh.
